title: The Works Santa’s Yes or No Christmas Game Crackers: Pack of 6
description: Product description These amazing Yes or No Christmas Game Crackers feature a classic red and white design, sure to add a touch of Christmas Spirit to your table as well as providing the whole family with endless fun and laughter. Includes:• 6 x Christmas Crackers ( Each contains a hat, motto and snap)• 12 x Question Cards• Instructions Work round the table answering the 24 questions with anything but Yes or NO. Perfect for the whole family at the dinner table this Christmas! Product Information:• Santa’s Yes or No Christmas Game• Christmas Crackers• Pack of 6• Christmas • Measures: 9 inches• Recyclable crackers and packaging Ingredients No ingredients, not a food item
